# PR Review Checklist

Use this checklist when reviewing pull requests generated by AI agents.


## 1. Scope Check

Confirm the PR stays within the issue scope.

- [ ] PR references a GitHub issue
- [ ] Changes match the issue description
- [ ] No unrelated features were added
- [ ] No large refactors outside the issue scope


## 2. Code Changes

Quick sanity check of the code.

- [ ] Changes are understandable
- [ ] No unnecessary file modifications
- [ ] No duplicated components or logic
- [ ] No dead or commented-out code
- [ ] Naming is consistent with the project


## 3. UI Review

If the PR changes UI:

- [ ] Layout spacing looks consistent
- [ ] No misaligned elements
- [ ] Text hierarchy is clear
- [ ] Buttons look consistent with the design
- [ ] No elements overlapping or clipped


## 4. Mobile Layout

Check small screens.

- [ ] UI works on typical mobile screen width
- [ ] No horizontal scrolling
- [ ] Buttons remain easy to tap
- [ ] Text remains readable


## 5. Navigation Safety

Verify the change did not break navigation.

- [ ] Links still work
- [ ] Screen transitions still function
- [ ] No dead-end screens


## 6. Runtime Behavior

Run the app and confirm:

- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No obvious performance issues
- [ ] Feature behaves as expected
- [ ] No unrelated flows are broken


## 7. Code Health

Look for common AI mistakes.

- [ ] No unused imports
- [ ] No duplicated logic
- [ ] No random console logs left behind
- [ ] No magic numbers where constants should be used


## 8. Regression Scan

Quick scan of nearby features.

- [ ] Adjacent screens still work
- [ ] Shared components still render correctly
- [ ] No visual regressions introduced


## 9. Merge Decision

Only merge if all of the following are true:

- [ ] Scope respected
- [ ] Feature works
- [ ] UI acceptable
- [ ] No regressions
